response.justification: Bogdan brings approximately 20 years of broad software engineering experience and recent hands-on exposure to AI tooling (MCP code generators, agentic workflows at Naver), but the Principal Engineer — AI Strategy role demands recognized, deep AI expertise with demonstrated AI products or platforms at scale, director-level strategic advisory credibility, and ideally an advanced degree in an AI-related field. His AI involvement is nascent and confined to developer tooling infrastructure; there is no evidence of ML/AI architecture ownership, AI product launches, or the customer/partner-facing strategic advisory work this director-level IC position requires.
strengths: 20+ years of engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure, comfortably exceeding the 15-year minimum
Current role at Naver includes hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP frameworks, agentic workflows), showing genuine and timely AI engagement
Demonstrated external influence through open-source leadership, conference talks (FOSS4G), and community workshops — aligned with the 'inspire others' responsibility
concerns: No advanced degree in AI or a related field; both degrees are at bachelor level (CS and Fine Arts), falling short of the preferred Master's/PhD in AI
AI experience is shallow and recent — limited to MCP developer tooling at current role — with no demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or strategic advisory work at the scale this role expects
Technical skills inventory (JS/TS, DLang, PHP, Swift) lacks ML frameworks, cloud AI platform depth (SageMaker, Vertex AI, Azure AI), and data science tooling expected of a recognized AI principal

key_factors.factor: Absence of advanced AI degree or recognized AI work
